diagnosis: Legacy SpringerLink book-chapter / encyclopedia pages (DOI prefix 10.1007/978-*, 10.1007/bf*) emit no JSON-LD 'description', no section.Abstract, no section[data-title=Abstract|Introduction], and no section.Section1 with an Introduction/Abstract/Summary heading. The chapter abstract on those pages lives only in og:description and <meta name=description>. parse_abstract() returned None for them. Of 62 Springer rows with gold abstract_len>=50 but parser.present=false, 57 are recoverable from those meta tags (>=80 chars).
expected_kpi_impact_basis: 57 of 954 Springer rows recover an abstract >=80 chars from og:description/meta description (57/954 = 5.97 pp gross presence lift). fuzzy_ratio lift is bounded above by the fraction whose meta blurb matches the gold annotation; conservatively ~4-6 pp on ratio_fuzzy. No regression: DOM Abstract / data-title=Abstract / Introduction / Section1 branches all still fire first; meta fallback is final-resort. Verified 4 already-working samples unchanged (lens 360/394/661/1018).
